intro: Deep in the temple, a great stone totem stands wreathed in a faint, watchful aura. As you approach, its carved eyes flare to life and the ground begins to tremble.
title: The Totem Trial
description: An aura-wreathed guardian totem awakens to test those who enter. Best it in battle - it is a powerful multi-bar boss, several levels above your strongest Pokemon - to claim a high-tier reward and a blessing Relic. Or leave it at rest.

1.label: Face the totem
1.tooltip:
(+) Win for a guaranteed high-tier reward + a Relic
(?) A tough multi-bar boss, above your level
1.selected: You square up as the totem heaves itself upright and the trial begins!

2.label: Leave it at rest
2.selected: You lower your eyes and step back, leaving the guardian undisturbed.
